name: Jasper de Shields
tagline: I build products from zero to revenue.
bio:
I own product end-to-end — from identifying problems worth solving to shipping and measuring what changes because of it. I don't get handed a strategy and execute it. I define the strategy, set the North Star metric, and make the problem disappear.

Most PMs can't build. Most engineers can't think in users. I do both — and I use AI systems to do it at a pace most teams can't match. Five concurrent projects, each at a different stage: one in App Store review, one live with automated marketing, one in demo phase for an internal pitch. The infrastructure running all of it operates without me in the loop.

I think in leading and lagging indicators, not just features shipped. I run structured discovery using JTBD framing before I write a line of spec. I instrument the funnel before launch, not after. And I've shipped products from conception to launch in 7 days — not by cutting corners, but by making every decision count.

The goal isn't a bigger role. It's financial independence through products that compound after I stop touching them. Every system I design, I design myself out of.
currentFocus: North in App Store review. Building the agent infrastructure that runs the passive income stack autonomously.
